subject: Independence Day Offer: Save 50% on a Times Subscription for a Limited Time Only.
body:
View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D48H9W%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

DON'T MISS OUR INDEPENDENCE DAY SALE

SAVE 50% FOR 26 WEEKS ON A TIMES SUBSCRIPTION

ENDS JULY 7!*

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/sub01

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

Independence Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage 
of big subscription savings. Now you can save 50% for a full 
26 weeks on any subscription. 

Choose whichever option works best for you: 

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access 
to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative 
multimedia, from the world's finest journalists, on NYTimes.com 
and NYTimes mobile apps including the new NYT Opinion app 
for iPhone(R). 

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print 
edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your subscription 
includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and apps for your 
smartphone and tablet, including the new NYT Opinion app. Plus get 
a free additional log in so a friend or family member can also 
enjoy digital access. 

NYT Opinion is our most affordable subscription and brings you 
the best in opinion from around the world, all in one location. 
You'll enjoy unlimited access to our expanded Opinion section on 
NYTimes.com and our new NYT Opinion app. 

Don't miss this opportunity to enjoy exceptional savings on 
your choice of Times subscription. 

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS JULY 7!*

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/sub02


*****

All subscriptions include:

-- Inspiring journalism

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Reliable coverage

-- NYT Opinion app

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/sub03

-----------------------------------------------------------------

This email was sent to you as a registered user on NYTimes.com.

*This sale expires on July 9, 2014, 9 a.m. ET. 

Mobile apps are not supported on all devices. Does not include 
Times Premier content, e-reader editions or The New York Times 
Crossword. Home Delivery promotional offer valid for new 
subscribers in areas served by The New York Times Delivery Service. 
Other restrictions apply. 

Apple and the Apple logo are trademarks of Apple Inc., registered 
in the U.S. and other countries. iPhone is a trademark of Apple Inc. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/nyt

Privacy Policy:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/privacy

Contact Us:
help@nytimes.com

Unsubscribe:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTs9gmB81HXJB869k0AAwENcF9/unsub?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&REGI_ID=47275261

Don't Miss Our Independence Day Sale -- Save 50% For 26 Weeks On A Times Subscription
View in browser
Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

Independence Day weekend is the perfect time to take advantage of big subscription savings. Now you can
save 50% for a full 26 weeks on any subscription.

Choose whichever option works best for you:

An Unlimited Digital subscription gives you unlimited access to our in-depth articles, immersive storytelling and innovative multimedia, from the world’s finest journalists, on NYTimes.com and NYTimes mobile apps including the new NYT Opinion app for iPhone®.

Home Delivery is the convenient way to get the unrivaled print edition of The Times, first thing in the morning. Your subscription includes unlimited access to NYTimes.com and apps for your smartphone and tablet, including the new NYT Opinion app. Plus get a free additional log in so a friend or family member can also enjoy digital access.

NYT Opinion is our most affordable subscription and brings you the best in opinion from around the world, all in one location. You’ll enjoy unlimited access to our expanded Opinion section on NYTimes.com and our new NYT Opinion app.

Don’t miss this opportunity to enjoy exceptional savings on your choice of Times subscription.

ACT NOW! SALE ENDS JULY 7!*

*This sale expires on July 9, 2014, 9 a.m. ET.
